meta.title: DEF CON 33 -BiC Village -Let's Lose the Shock: Mystery of Linux - A Pain Free Intro - DJ Davis
meta.description: Linux is powerful—but intimidating. This talk removes the mystery with comparisons to Windows, clear explanations of key concepts, and practical tips for getting started.
